info.description: The API reference documentation for endpoints related to service provision management.
info.title: Service provision management

get.description:
Retrieve a list of service provisions by applying filters. A service offer provides a distinct set of functionalities that can be independently identified and assigned access. Service offers are typically associated with roles and permissions, commerce, metering, quote-to-cash, and trial evaluations. A service provision occurs when a service offer is provisioned (added) to a workspace.

**Pagination**: This endpoint supports cursor-based pagination using the `next` query parameter. Provide the cursor in the `next` query parameter to retrieve the next page.

parameters.description: The workspace ID. Required if the "view all" parameter is false.
parameters.name: Hpe-workspace-id

parameters.description: Specify the start ID for the next page of service offers.
parameters.name: next

schema.description: Specifies the start ID for the next page of service offers.
schema.title: Pagination cursor

parameters.description: Specify the number of results to be returned.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description:
Limit the entities operated on by this endpoint by returning only the subset of entities that match the filter. The filter grammar is a subset of OData 4.0.
**Supported Fields:** `id`, `ServiceOfferId`, `workspaceId`, `serviceManagerProvisionId`, `serviceManagerId`, `serviceManagerInstanceId`, `status`, `organizationId`, `slug`.
**Supported operand:** `eq`
**Supported operations:** `and`
parameters.name: filter

parameters.description: If true, returns the complete entry including sensitive fields.
parameters.name: unredacted

schema.description: Request the complete entry along with the sensitive fields.
schema.title: unredacted

parameters.description: If true, returns unredacted entries for all workspaces, including all provisioned service offers and their sensitive fields.
parameters.name: all

schema.description: Request unredacted entries for all workspaces. This displays all the service offers that are provisioned under all workspaces, along with their sensitive fields.
schema.title: all

post.description:
The initial step to provision a service offer in a region. A service offer provides a distinct set of functionalities that can be independently identified and assigned access. Service offers are typically associated with roles and permissions, commerce, metering, quote-to-cash, and trial evaluations.

You need to supply the following in the request body.

  • `serviceOfferId`-From Service offer management use the `Get service offers` endpoint to find service offer IDs.
  • `region`-From Service offer management use the `Get service offer regions` endpoint to find region codes.

parameters.description: The unique identifier of a service offer. The ID is returned by the `Get service provisions` endpoint.
parameters.name: id

schema.description: The unique identifier for the service offer. The ID is returned by the `Get service provisions` endpoint.
schema.title: Id

parameters.description: Specifies the force-delete action, regardless of the provision status.
parameters.name: force

schema.description: If set to true, specifies the force delete action (irrespective of provision status).
schema.title: Force-flag

parameters.description: Generation version match. To avoid unintended deletions, the generation version must match. This value is incremented whenever the record is updated.
parameters.name: If-Match

schema.description: Generation version match. To avoid unintended deletions, the generation version must match. This value is incremented whenever the record is updated.
schema.title: If-Match

schema.title: Id

parameters.description: If set to true, get the entire entry along with sensitive fields.
parameters.name: unredacted

schema.description: Request the complete entry along with the sensitive fields for user workspace
schema.title: unredacted

post.description: Retrigger service provisioning if it has failed.

parameters.name: id

schema.description: The unique identifier for the service provision.
schema.title: Id
